page_metadata.biotools__summary: AutoScore-Ordinal is a novel machine learning framework to automate the development of interpretable clinical scoring models for ordinal outcomes, which expands the original AutoScore framework for binary outcomes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AutoScore-Ordinal is a novel machine learning framework to automate the development of interpretable clinical scoring models for ordinal outcomes, which expands the original AutoScore framework for binary outcomes.
